objection_pairs.objection: It sounds too good to be true. PHP 395K monthly?
objection_pairs.response:
💯 Valid question! Here's the proof:

✓ Airbnb market rates: PHP 14-16K/night in this location
✓ With 65% occupancy: 20 nights = PHP 280K-320K
✓ Our 395K includes premium positioning
✓ HISTORICAL DATA: Check Airbnb Bohol similar properties
✓ MANAGEMENT TRACK RECORD: 2 villas operating now, averaging 395K
✓ CONTRACTS: Guaranteed income or we supplement

We have video proof from existing owners. Want to see?

objection_pairs.objection: What if tourism drops in Bohol?
objection_pairs.response:
📈 Bohol tourism is GROWING:

• Tourism +38% YoY (2023-2025)
• Airport expansion: 2M → 2.5M passengers (2026)
• JW Marriott + Mithi Resort investing $300M
• Direct flights from Asia increasing
• Post-pandemic recovery strong

IF tourism dropped (lowest probability):
→ Minimum 65% occupancy GUARANTEED by contract
→ We supplement difference
→ Property value remains stable (land value)

NO SCENARIO results in loss.

objection_pairs.objection: Management company could disappear with my money
objection_pairs.response:
🔐 That won't happen. Here's why:

• Blue Everest: Registered Philippine company (SEC)
• Founders: 15+ years real estate experience
• Bank deposits: BDO, not company account
• Audited financials: Reviewed quarterly
• Insurance: All deposits covered
• Legal: Property in YOUR name, management is service contract
• Backup: If manager fails, property continues operating independently

Your investment is legally protected.

objection_pairs.objection: I'm worried about international ownership regulations
objection_pairs.response:
✅ No issues. Foreign ownership IS allowed:

Philippine law:
• Foreigners can own residential condos (we offer villa ownership via cooperative)
• Long-term lease alternative exists (50+ years legal)
• We handle ALL legalities
• Government-approved transaction structure

Israelis specifically:
• 50+ Israeli owners in similar Bohol properties
• No tax complications
• CPA recommendations available
• We've done this before

Legal review included in process.

🏗️ This location is BUILDING UP, not down:

✓ JW Marriott (2019) established permanence
✓ Mithi Resort (2020) elevated the area
✓ Infrastructure investment: New roads, airport
✓ 3-5% property appreciation historically
✓ Our properties INCLUDE maintenance fund
✓ Property inspections: Quarterly
✓ Upgrades: Regular (passed to Airbnb guests)

NEXT 5 YEARS: Area will only improve.

🌍 Diversification is smart! We're PART of a strategy:

Benefits of Bohol investment:
✓ Higher ROI: 17-25% vs 3-5% local
✓ Lower entry: PHP 32.5M vs ₪ 2M+ local property

Add this to your portfolio alongside local real estate.
